skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video creation agent for producing short videos (5-120 seconds). Create product ads, social media content for TikTok/Instagram/YouTube, brand videos, explainers, and promotional clips with automated scriptwriting, shot composition, and music selection.
skill.summary: Create AI-generated short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, ads, and brand content using Pexo's professional video production API.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 492 potential issues across 11 files (1910 lines). After evaluation, all findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate API client for Pexo video creation service. Shell command usage, network access, and credential handling are all expected functionality for an API client tool. MD5 usage is in documentation context only. No malicious intent, credential exfiltration, or unauthorized operations detected.

medium_findings.title: MD5 Usage in Documentation
medium_findings.description: Static scanner detected MD5 hash usage in reference documentation files. This is in the context of documentation examples only, not in executable code. Not a security vulnerability in this context.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Substitution
low_findings.description: Extensive use of shell command substitution $() across all bash scripts. This is standard bash syntax and expected behavior for shell scripts. All substitutions use hardcoded, validated arguments with no user input injection vectors.

low_findings.title: Documentation Code Examples
low_findings.description: Ruby/shell backtick patterns detected in SKILL.md documentation. These are markdown code examples showing usage, not executable code.

content.user_title: Generate AI Videos for Social Media and Marketing
content.value_statement: Creating professional short videos for social media, ads, and marketing takes hours of editing work. This skill automates video production with AI-generated scripts, shot composition, transitions, and music selection.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Upload and reference images, videos, and audio files in projects
Generate AI-powered scripts, shot compositions, and transitions
Preview multiple video options and select preferred versions
Download final videos with direct URL access
Track project progress and handle revision requests
limitations: Video production takes 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video
Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded before upload
Requires valid Pexo API key and account
Each message to Pexo consumes API tokens

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional product videos for online stores by uploading product images and generating AI-optimized marketing content.
use_cases.target_user: Small business owners and e-commerce managers

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Produce engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts with vertical video format and platform-optimized pacing.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Brand Storytelling Videos
use_cases.description: Generate professional brand videos and explainers with cinematic shot composition and integrated music selection.

prompt_templates.title: Create Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product video for my [product name]. I uploaded product images. Focus on [key features] with upbeat music.
prompt_templates.scenario: User has product images and wants a promotional video

prompt_templates.title: Generate Social Media Clip
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a vertical 15-second TikTok video about [topic]. Use trending style with fast cuts and energetic music.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs social media content for trending topics

prompt_templates.title: Brand Explainer Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second horizontal brand explainer video for [company/industry]. Professional tone with smooth transitions.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs a professional brand introduction video

prompt_templates.title: Request Video Revision
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to revise the video. [describe specific changes: slower pacing, different music style, emphasize certain shots, etc.]
prompt_templates.scenario: User has received initial video and wants modifications

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second product video for my running shoes. Focus on comfort and durability.
output_examples.output: I have submitted your video request to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. You can track progress at https://pexo.ai/project/proj_123. Pexo may ask clarifying questions about color preferences or music style before production begins.

output_examples.input: I want a TikTok-style video about my new coffee shop
output_examples.output: Your TikTok video request has been submitted to Pexo! Production typically takes 15-20 minutes. Track your project at: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_456. I will notify you when preview options are ready for your selection.

best_practices: Provide clear, specific descriptions of your video goals including target audience, style preferences, and key elements to emphasize
Upload high-quality reference images (product photos, logos, brand assets) before sending your video request for better results
Use the same project ID for revision requests instead of creating new projects to maintain context and save tokens
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or technical specifications that Pexo did not request - let the AI agent determine optimal parameters
Do not send multiple messages to Pexo while nextAction is WAIT - this triggers duplicate video production and wastes tokens
Do not truncate video download URLs - always include all query parameters (OSSAccessKeyId, Expires, Signature) or the link will fail

faq.question: How long does video production take?
faq.answer: Approximately 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time. The skill polls for status every 60 seconds and notifies you when complete.

faq.question: What video formats and aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Pexo outputs videos in 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical/portrait for TikTok and Instagram Reels), and 1:1 (square) aspect ratios. Supported upload formats include JPG, PNG, WebP for images; MP4, MOV, AVI for videos; and MP3, WAV, AAC for audio.

faq.question: How do I get started with my API key?
faq.answer: Create a config file at ~/.pexo/config with your PEXO_BASE_URL (https://pexo.ai) and PEXO_API_KEY. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup. API keys should start with 'sk-' prefix.

faq.question: Can I revise my video after production?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send your revision feedback as a message. Pexo will regenerate the video based on your feedback. Each revision consumes additional API tokens.

faq.question: Why did my video URL fail with 403 Forbidden?
faq.answer: The download URL includes authentication query parameters. Always copy the full URL including OSSAccessKeyId, Expires, and Signature parameters. Truncated URLs will fail authentication.

faq.question: Does this skill work with videos from web URLs?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. If you have a link to a file, download it locally first, then upload it using pexo-upload.sh before referencing it in your video request.
